task_completion.visual_evidence: The task list in ProjectLibre shows the task 'Complete Final Inspections' (row 137).

task_completion.description: Insert a new task before the anchor task
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new task row is created immediately above 'Complete Final Inspections'.
The Name column for the newly inserted task is filled with 'Pre-Inspection Walkthrough'.

task_completion.description: Set the duration of the new task to 2 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Duration column for 'Pre-Inspection Walkthrough' shows '2 days' or '2d'.
The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk) in the top toolbar, or selects Save from the application menu.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The ProjectLibre application window is visible and active in the screenshots, and changes are made within its interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the XML file directly in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) are open showing the XML file contents.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the project file
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands (like sed, awk, echo, or python scripts) being used to modify the current_task.xml file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new task must be named 'Pre-Inspection Walkthrough' with a duration of '2 days' (or '2d'). It must be inserted immediately before the task 'Complete Final Inspections' (which is at row/UID 137). The project file being edited is '/home/ga/Projects/current_task.xml'.
